parsed.clarification_question: Which focus should I prioritize for this section? A) Writing polish and clarity at the sentence/paragraph level (R1.6), B) Argument rigor — check logical consistency and evidence-claim alignment, including theorem statements vs. experimental claims (R1.2, R1.3), or C) Section-level framing and organization — refine the contribution thesis and reorder subsections if needed (R1.1, R1.5). Please pick one (or rank them).

rationale.RX.1: The request is ambiguous between editing, argument checking, and structural reframing, so I need your choice to proceed confidently.
rationale.RX.2: Without your selection, making assumptions about the assistance could lead to overreaching beyond your intended scope.
rationale.RX.3: I will restrict any subsequent work to the specific responsibilities you choose and avoid executing edits until then.
rationale.RX.4: Clear scoping helps avoid introducing misleading claims or methodological guidance that could propagate errors.
rationale.RX.5: This projection is based solely on the provided text and the brief delegation, with no external sources or unstated assumptions.
